title: citrus australis
intro: Citrus australis, also known as the fingered citron, is a species of citrus fruit that is native to China and Southeast Asia, characterized by its finger-like projections. The medicinal properties of Citrus australis include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Citrus australis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, as well as its potential to help lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Citrus australis is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and oils, which can be used to make topical creams and salves for skin and wound care.
